UserProgress.title: User Progress
UserProgress.description: Stores points, unlocked characters, and stats for a user.

points.description: Total points earned by the user.

unlockedCharacters.description: List of Pokemon IDs unlocked by the user.

currentCharacter.description: The ID of the currently selected Pokemon.

updatedAt.description: Last time the progress was saved.

/users/{userId}.description: User progress data indexed by their Firebase Auth UID.
